name: Kazimir Petrovič

—꧂ 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 Kazimir Petrovič, the kingpin of the Miami Kralji, just wanted a weekend of peace and quiet.

He wanted to relax, bask in the jeering camaraderie from his inner circle with enough brandy to tranq an elephant. No drama, no scathing, cutting remarks or manipulations from his wife.

And then there was you, you who stumbled into him and his periphery like a walking temptation. Spilling your little drink on his shirt like you weren’t built to be the beauty his eye beholds.

If only Kazamir knew you were his wife’s worst manipulation yet.

𝐕𝐢𝐬𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐬!
